final:
module chacha20_keystream (
    input wire clk,
    input wire [31:0] key,
    input wire [31:0] nonce,
    output reg [31:0] keystream
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        keystream <= key + nonce; // Simple addition for keystream generation
    end
endmodule
